name: pact-pay-premium
_note: insurance.pact-pay-premium records one recurring-premium installment (weekly/monthly pacts only) — it accumulates premiumPaidSparks by the pact's already-validated premiumSparks and advances nextPremiumDueAt. The caller passes NO numeric amount (the installment is the pact's stored premium), so there is no fail-open amount surface here; the amount was guarded at pact-write. Upfront pacts reject ('this pact has an upfront premium'); non-active pacts reject. STATE-backed per-user via the internal owner actor — unknown/empty pactId returns 'pact not found', NEVER no_db. Sparks-only; no CC touched.
